summary: Iteration 59: Multi-tenant Partner Organizations fully tested. 21/21 backend tests pass. Frontend login page (two tabs) and admin panel brand colors verified. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) POST /api/admin/tenants returned 500 due to MongoDB _id ObjectId serialization; (2) Login.tsx had TypeScript compilation overlay blocking form submission due to relative imports not matching shadcn type declarations.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: POST /api/admin/tenants in /app/backend/routes/admin/tenants.py - db.insert_one(doc) mutates doc by adding MongoDB _id (ObjectId). FastAPI could not serialize response. Fixed: insert_one({**doc}) to pass a copy.

BUG FIXED: Login.tsx TypeScript compilation overlay - imports used '../components/ui/alert' and '../components/ui/tabs' relative paths but shadcn-ui.d.ts declares '@/components/ui/*' aliases. Changed all imports to '@/' path aliases; also added missing Alert, Label type declarations to shadcn-ui.d.ts.
seed_data_creation: Test tenants created during run are deactivated after test. Tenant B (tenant-b-test) was re-activated after inactive-login tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant feature fully working. Backend: 21 tests covering partner-login, tenant-info, admin/tenants CRUD, data isolation (Tenant B sees 0 customers/products), inactive tenant 403 blocking, platform admin restrictions. Frontend: Login page has Partner Login + Customer Login tabs (both with partner_code + email + password). Partner login redirects to /admin. Admin hero uses var(--aa-primary), sidebar active tab uses aa-tab-trigger class with var(--aa-primary) bg. Two bugs were fixed this iteration: MongoDB _id in tenant creation response + Login.tsx TS import path fix.

bug1_mongodb_objectid.root_cause: db.insert_one(doc) mutates the dict in-place by adding MongoDB _id (ObjectId). When FastAPI serializes return {'tenant': doc}, it fails with 'ObjectId not JSON serializable' → 500 Internal Server Error → Cloudflare 520
bug1_mongodb_objectid.fix: Changed `await db.tenants.insert_one(doc)` to `await db.tenants.insert_one({**doc})` to pass a shallow copy, keeping original doc clean
bug1_mongodb_objectid.reproduction: POST /api/admin/tenants with valid platform admin token

bug2_typescript_imports.root_cause: Login.tsx used relative imports (`../components/ui/alert`, `../components/ui/tabs`) while shadcn-ui.d.ts only declares `@/components/ui/*` path aliases. TypeScript inferred components as forwardRef<any> without children/className/variant props → Compiled with problems overlay in dev mode → Overlay blocked form submission
bug2_typescript_imports.fix: Changed all imports to @/ path aliases, added Alert/Label type declarations to shadcn-ui.d.ts
